description: A taxpayer has a W-2 and also received a Form 1099-INT for interest earned on a savings account.

nodes.task_description: Enter the data from the taxpayer's Form W-2.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs the W-2 information.

nodes.task_description: Enter the interest income from Form 1099-INT onto Schedule B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs the interest income.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the interest income is correctly transferred to Form 1040.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the total income on the main form is correct.
